hero_subtitle: SFTY supports ADGM supervisory teams by connecting licensing data, VASP oversight, Travel Rule review, and evidence logging into one secure regulatory workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data

problem_title: Regulatory alignment falters across complex frameworks
problem_description: Regulators struggle to integrate ADGM rules into coherent supervisory workflows due to fragmented data and disconnected regulatory requirements. This slows review processes, weakens audit readiness and limits clear oversight across digital asset activities.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY organizes fragmented ADGM regulatory data, licensing records, wallet activity and risk signals into one connected supervisory layer that supports case management, audit evidence and reporting workflows for regulators.
workflow_title: From regulatory update to supervisory action
workflow_description: SFTY maps ADGM regulatory changes into internal supervisory rules that drive alerts, case creation, investigation, evidence preservation and reporting workflows for regulators.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. Supervisory control plane
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented ADGM regulatory data, market signals, cases and evidence into one secure supervisory layer for comprehensive regulatory framework alignment.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY provides government teams with secure deployment, evidence-grade logging, role-based access and procurement-safe architecture tailored for ADGM regulatory review readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for ADGM regulators?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides ADGM regulators with a secure supervisory layer that connects VASP profiles, licensing, wallets, transactions, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule data and reporting workflows under ADGM rules.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support ADGM supervisory workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures ADGM supervisory workflows by linking alerts, cases, investigations and reporting into one platform aligned with ADGM licensing and Travel Rule operational requirements.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve evidence for audits?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence-grade audit records to support ADGM inspection readiness and regulatory review with clear documentation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing ADGM systems?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports phased integration with ADGM registries, reporting systems and multiple third-party providers while enforcing access governance and audit logging.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current analytics or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing analytics and compliance tools by orchestrating their outputs into structured supervisory workflows without replacing them.
final_title: Review ADGM supervisory workflows with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects ADGM licensing, VASP oversight, Travel Rule data and evidence into one structured supervisory environment.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
